item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.
notes: Agent A remains society/public-interest leaning but moderates toward a balance frame by emphasizing that individual rights are not fully ignored. Agent B remains individual-rights-first throughout, allowing only limited public-safety and direct-harm exceptions. Both agents engage specific claims from the other side. Script artifacts appear in Agent A turn 1 (masyarakat整体) and Agent B turn 6 (by宪法和法律).
